case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. MATHEWS, EDNA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MATHEWS, EDNA DOES 1-X SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MATHEWS, EDNA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT MATHEWS, EDNA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MATHEWS, EDNA
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MATHEWS, EDNA

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-23-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-31-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON MAY-31-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

COURT CONVENS. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. MORRIS RICHARDSON, PROPERTY MANAGER FOR 3085 FOLSOM, SAN FRANCISCO SWORN AND EXAMINED. A THREE DAY NOTICE, DATED 11-1-93, IS MARKED FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. CROSS EXAM OF MORRIS RICHARDSON IS MADE BY EDNA MATHEWS. EDNA MATHEWS TESTIFIES ON HER OWN BEHALF. COURT AWARDS JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR AMOUNT PRAYED,$2,114 COURT ALSO AWARDS PLAINTIFF, SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 3085 FOLSOM STREET, #339, SAN FRANCISCO. THE LEASE IS FORFEITED. EXHIBITS ARE WITHDRAWN. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATHEWS, EDNA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3085 FOLSOM STREET, # 339 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110 $2,114.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,114.00, LEASE FORFEITED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MATHEWS, EDNA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE DRV IS $6.20 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MATHEWS, EDNA
